summary: Laser engraving control application similar to LaserGBRL for Wizmaker Wand Mini 2.5W laser engraver, featuring Web Serial API connectivity, image-to-G-code conversion (line scanning and vector/contour tracing), adjustable parameters (laser power, speed, resolution), manual jog controls with auto-centering, homing commands, work origin setting, G-code file upload, and command history with progress tracking
architectural_notes: Frontend-only application using Web Serial API for direct USB connection to laser engraver
React + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS for UI
Browser-based image processing for G-code generation
Progress tracking based on command sending with serial response monitoring (no WebSocket support)
Target device: Wizmaker Wand Mini 2.5W laser engraver
Permissions-Policy headers required to allow Web Serial API access
Secure context (HTTPS) mandatory for Web Serial API functionality
known_issues: Real-time position feedback limited to Web Serial API responses - no WebSocket-based live telemetry available
Progress tracking based on commands sent rather than true device position updates
Permissions policy error when accessing Web Serial API - requires proper headers and HTTPS

existing_features.title: Implement Web Serial API integration to connect to Wizmaker Wand Mini 2.5W laser engraver via USB, including connection/disconnection controls and serial port selection
Create image upload functionality that accepts bitmap images (JPG, PNG) for conversion to G-code
Implement line-by-line scanning G-code generation algorithm that converts bitmap images to G-code commands for the Wizmaker Wand Mini
Implement vector/contour tracing G-code generation algorithm that converts images to outline-based engraving paths
Create adjustable parameter controls for laser power intensity, engraving speed, and resolution with real-time preview of how settings affect G-code generation
Implement manual jog controls with directional buttons for X and Y axis movement, including adjustable jog distance settings
Implement auto-centering functionality that calculates and moves the laser head to the center position of the work area
Implement homing commands functionality that sends the laser head to home position (origin)
Implement work origin setting capability that allows users to set the current position as the work coordinate origin
Create G-code file upload functionality that allows users to upload pre-made G-code files for sending to the laser engraver
Implement command history display that shows all G-code commands sent to the laser engraver with timestamps
Implement job progress tracking interface that displays engraving progress based on commands sent via Web Serial API, including current line number, percentage complete, and estimated time remaining
Implement serial response monitoring that captures and displays responses from the laser engraver received via Web Serial API

Design and implement a professional, industrial-themed UI with a dark color scheme suitable for precision laser engraving control, featuring clear visual hierarchy for safety-critical controls and real-time monitoring displays

Add Permissions-Policy HTTP headers to the frontend deployment configuration to explicitly allow the 'serial' feature, ensuring the Web Serial API can be accessed without browser permissions policy errors

Enhance error handling in useWebSerial hook to detect and display user-friendly error messages when Web Serial API access is blocked, including guidance about HTTPS requirement and browser compatibility
Add secure context validation in useWebSerial hook to check if the application is running over HTTPS before attempting Web Serial API access, and display a warning if accessed over HTTP

new_feature_requests.summary: Web Serial API connection to Wizmaker Wand Mini via USB
Image-to-G-code conversion with line scanning method
Image-to-G-code conversion with vector/contour tracing method
Adjustable parameters: laser power intensity, engraving speed, and resolution
Manual jog controls for X/Y axes movement
Auto-centering capability for laser head positioning
Job progress tracking interface via Web Serial API
